# opnsense_ipsec_manual_spd (Data Source)

Reads an IPsec manual security policy (SPD) on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `connection_child` (String) UUID of an associated connection child (optional).
- `description` (String) Description.
- `destination` (String) Destination network (CIDR).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this SPD entry is enabled.
- `protocol` (String) Security protocol: esp or ah (defaults to esp).
- `req_id` (Number) Request ID linking this policy to a tunnel.
- `source` (String) Source network (CIDR).
